 84→private val LOGGER = KotlinLogging.logger {}.initKtLintKLogger()
 85→
 86→/**
 87→ * This rule inserts missing newlines (e.g. between parentheses of a multi-line function call). This logic previously
 88→ * was part of the IndentationRule (phase 1).
 89→ *
 90→ * Whenever a linebreak is inserted, this rules assumes that the parent node it indented correctly. So the indentation
 91→ * is fixed with respect to indentation of the parent. This is just a simple best effort for the case that the
 92→ * indentation rule is not run.
 93→ */
 94→public class WrappingRule :
 95→    StandardRule(
 96→        id = "wrapping",
 97→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 98→            setOf(
 99→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
100→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
101→                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
102→            ),
103→        visitorModifiers =
104→            setOf(
105→                RunAfterRule(
106→                    ruleId = ANNOTATION_RULE_ID,
107→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
108→                ),
109→            ),
110→    ) {
111→    private var line = 1
112→    private var indentConfig = DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
113→    private var maxLineLength: Int = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
114→
115→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
116→        line = 1
117→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
118→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
119→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
120→        )
121→        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
122→    }
123→
124→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
125→        node: ASTNode,
126→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
127→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
128→    ) {
129→        when (node.elementType) {
130→            BLOCK -> beforeVisitBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit)
131→            LPAR, LBRACKET -> rearrangeBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit) // TODO: LT
132→            SUPER_TYPE_LIST -> rearrangeSuperTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
133→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST, VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST -> rearrangeValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
134→            TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST, TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> rearrangeTypeArgumentList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
135→//            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> rearrangeTypeParameterList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
136→            ARROW -> rearrangeArrow(node, autoCorrect, emit)
137→            WHITE_SPACE -> line += node.text.count { it == '\n' }
138→            CLOSING_QUOTE -> rearrangeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    private fun beforeVisitBlock(
143→        node: ASTNode,
144→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
145→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
146→    ) {
147→        require(node.elementType == BLOCK)
148→
149→        val startOfBlock = node.prevLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
150→        if (startOfBlock?.elementType != LBRACE) {
151→            return
152→        }
153→        val blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline = startOfBlock.nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
154→        val endOfBlock = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
155→        val blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline = endOfBlock?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
156→        val wrapBlock =
157→            when {
158→                startOfBlock.isPartOf(LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) -> {
159→                    // String template inside raw string literal may exceed the maximum line length
160→                    false
161→                }
162→                blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline -> false
163→                node.textContains('\n') || blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline -> {
164→                    // A multiline block should always be wrapped unless it starts with an EOL comment
165→                    node.firstChildLeafOrSelf().elementType != EOL_COMMENT
166→                }
167→                maxLineLength != MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY_OFF -> {
168→                    val lengthUntilBeginOfLine =
169→                        node
170→                            .leaves(false)
171→                            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
172→                            .sumOf { it.textLength }
173→                    val lengthUntilEndOfLine =
174→                        node
175→                            .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
176→                            .leavesIncludingSelf()
177→                            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
178→                            .sumOf { it.textLength }
179→                    lengthUntilBeginOfLine + lengthUntilEndOfLine > maxLineLength
180→                }
181→                else -> false
182→            }
183→        if (wrapBlock) {
184→            startOfBlock
185→                .takeIf { !it.nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
186→                ?.let { leafNodeBeforeBlock ->
187→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
188→                        leafNodeBeforeBlock,
189→                        autoCorrect,
190→                        emit,
191→                    )
192→                }
193→        }
194→    }
195→
196→    private fun rearrangeBlock(
197→        node: ASTNode,
198→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
199→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
200→    ) {
201→        val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[node.elementType]
202→        var newlineInBetween = false
203→        var parameterListInBetween = false
204→        var numberOfArgs = 0
205→        var firstArg: ASTNode? = null
206→        // matching ), ] or }
207→        val r = node.nextSibling {
208→            val isValueArgument = it.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT
209→            val hasLineBreak = if (isValueArgument) it.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN) else it.hasLineBreak()
210→            newlineInBetween = newlineInBetween || hasLineBreak
211→            parameterListInBetween = parameterListInBetween || it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST
212→            if (isValueArgument) {
213→                numberOfArgs++
214→                firstArg = it
215→            }
216→            it.elementType == rElementType
217→        }!!
218→        if (
219→            !newlineInBetween ||
220→            // keep { p ->
221→            // }
222→            (node.elementType == LBRACE && parameterListInBetween) ||
223→            // keep ({
224→            // }) and (object : C {
225→            // })
226→            (
227→                numberOfArgs == 1 &&
228→                    firstArg?.firstChildNode?.elementType
229→                        ?.let { it == OBJECT_LITERAL || it == LAMBDA_EXPRESSION } == true
230→                )
231→        ) {
232→            return
233→        }
234→        if (node.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()) {
235→            // keep:
236→            // for (foo in listOf(
237→            //     "foo-1",
238→            //     "foo-2"
239→            // )) { ... }
240→            // but reject:
241→            // for (
242→            //     foo in listOf(
243→            //         "foo-1",
244→            //         "foo-2"
245→            //     )
246→            // ) { ... }
247→            return
248→        }
249→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf {
250→                // Skip comments, whitespace, and empty nodes
251→                !it.isPartOfComment() &&
252→                    !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() &&
253→                    it.textLength > 0
254→            }.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
255→            // IDEA quirk:
256→            // if (true &&
257→            //     true
258→            // ) {
259→            // }
260→            // instead of
261→            // if (
262→            //     true &&
263→            //     true
264→            // ) {
265→            // }
266→            node.treeNext?.elementType != CONDITION
267→        ) {
268→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
269→        }
270→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
271→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.treeParent.indent())
272→        }
273→    }
274→
275→    private fun rearrangeSuperTypeList(
276→        node: ASTNode,
277→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
278→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
279→    ) {
280→        val entries = (node.psi as KtSuperTypeList).entries
281→        if (
282→            node.textContains('\n') &&
283→            entries.size > 1 &&
284→            // e.g.
285→            //
286→            // class A : B, C,
287→            //     D
288→            // or
289→            // class A : B, C({
290→            // }), D
291→            //
292→            // but not
293→            //
294→            // class A : B, C, D({
295→            // })
296→            !(
297→                entries.dropLast(1).all { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY } &&
298→                    entries.last().elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY
299→                )
300→        ) {
301→            // put space after :
302→            if (!node.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
303→                val colon = node.prevCodeLeaf()!!
304→                if (
305→                    !colon.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
306→                    colon.prevCodeLeaf().let { it?.elementType != RPAR || !it.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
307→                ) {
308→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(colon, autoCorrect, emit)
309→                }
310→            }
311→            // put entries on separate lines
312→            // TODO: group emit()s below with the one above into one (similar to ParameterListWrappingRule)
313→            for (c in node.children()) {
314→                if (c.elementType == COMMA &&
315→                    !c.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
316→                    !c.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine()
317→                ) {
318→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
319→                        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired = c,
320→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
321→                        emit = emit,
322→                        indent = node.indent(),
323→                    )
324→                }
325→            }
326→        }
327→    }
328→
329→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine() =
330→        nextLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
331→            ?.isPartOfComment() == true
332→
333→    private fun rearrangeValueList(
334→        node: ASTNode,
335→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
336→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
337→    ) {
338→        for (c in node.children()) {
339→            val hasLineBreak =
340→                when (c.elementType) {
341→                    VALUE_ARGUMENT -> c.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN)
342→                    VALUE_PARAMETER, ANNOTATION -> c.hasLineBreak()
343→                    else -> false
344→                }
345→            if (hasLineBreak) {
346→                // rearrange
347→                //
348→                // a, b, value(
349→                // ), c, d
350→                //
351→                // to
352→                //
353→                // a, b,
354→                // value(
355→                // ),
356→                // c, d
357→
358→                // insert \n in front of multi-line value
359→                val prevSibling = c.prevSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
360→                if (
361→                    prevSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
362→                    !prevSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
363→                ) {
364→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(prevSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
365→                }
366→                // insert \n after multi-line value
367→                val nextSibling = c.nextSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
368→                val hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter =
369→                    c.isLastValueParameter() && c.firstChildNode.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION
370→                if (
371→                    nextSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
372→                    !hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter &&
373→                    !nextSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
374→                    // value(
375→                    // ), // a comment
376→                    // c, d
377→                    nextSibling.treeNext?.treeNext?.psi !is PsiComment
378→                ) {
379→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(nextSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
380→                }
381→            }
382→        }
383→    }
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.isLastValueParameter() =
386→        elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER &&
387→            siblings().none { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
388→
389→    private fun rearrangeTypeArgumentList(
390→        node: ASTNode,
391→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
392→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
393→    ) {
394→        if (node.textContains('\n')) {
395→            // Each type projection must be preceded with a whitespace containing a newline
396→            node
397→                .children()
398→                .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION || it.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER }
399→                .forEach { typeProjection ->
400→                    typeProjection
401→                        .prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
402→                        .let { prevSibling ->
403→                            if (prevSibling?.elementType == LT || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
404→                                emit(typeProjection.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${typeProjection.text}'", true)
405→                                if (autoCorrect) {
406→                                    typeProjection.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
407→                                        node.treeParent.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent),
408→                                    )
409→                                }
410→                            }
411→                        }
412→                }
413→
414→            // After the last type projection a whitespace containing a newline must exist
415→            node
416→                .findChildByType(GT)
417→                ?.let { closingAngle ->
418→                    val prevSibling = closingAngle.prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
419→                    if (prevSibling?.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
420→                        emit(closingAngle.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${closingAngle.text}'", true)
421→                        if (autoCorrect) {
422→                            closingAngle.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
423→                                node.treeParent.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent),
424→                            )
425→                        }
426→                    }
427→                }
428→
429→            Unit
430→        }
431→    }
432→
433→    private fun rearrangeClosingQuote(
434→        node: ASTNode,
435→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
436→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
437→    ) {
438→        node
439→            .treeParent
440→            .takeIf { it.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE }
441→            ?.let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
442→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
443→            ?.takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
444→            ?.takeIf { node.treePrev.text.isNotBlank() }
445→            ?.let {
446→                // rewriting
447→                // """
448→                //     text
449→                // _""".trimIndent()
450→                // to
451→                // """
452→                //     text
453→                // _
454→                // """.trimIndent()
455→                emit(
456→                    node.startOffset,
457→                    "Missing newline before \"\"\"",
458→                    true,
459→                )
460→                if (autoCorrect) {
461→                    node as LeafPsiElement
462→                    node.rawInsertBeforeMe(LeafPsiElement(LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY, "\n"))
463→                }
464→                LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before (closing) \"\"\"" }
465→            }
466→    }
467→
468→    private fun mustBeFollowedByNewline(node: ASTNode): Boolean {
469→        // find EOL token (last token before \n)
470→        // if token is in lTokenSet
471→        //     find matching rToken
472→        //     return true if there is no newline after the rToken
473→        // return false
474→        val nextCodeSibling = node.nextCodeSibling() // e.g. BINARY_EXPRESSION
475→        var lToken = nextCodeSibling?.nextLeaf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }?.prevCodeLeaf()
476→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType !in LTOKEN_SET) {
477→            // special cases:
478→            // x = y.f({ z ->
479→            // })
480→            // x = y.f(0, 1,
481→            // 2, 3)
482→            lToken = lToken.prevLeaf { it.elementType in LTOKEN_SET || it == node }
483→        }
484→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType in LTOKEN_SET) {
485→            val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[lToken.elementType]
486→            val rToken = lToken.nextSibling { it.elementType == rElementType }
487→            return rToken?.treeParent == lToken.treeParent
488→        }
489→        if (nextCodeSibling?.textContains('\n') == false) {
490→            return true
491→        }
492→        return false
493→    }
494→
495→    private fun rearrangeArrow(
496→        node: ASTNode,
497→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
498→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
499→    ) {
500→        val p = node.treeParent
501→        if (
502→            // check
503→            // `{ p -> ... }`
504→            // and
505→            // `when { m -> ... }`
506→            // only
507→            p.elementType.let { it != FUNCTION_LITERAL && it != WHEN_ENTRY } ||
508→            // ... and only if expression after -> spans multiple lines
509→            !p.textContains('\n') ||
510→            // permit
511→            // when {
512→            //     m -> 0 + d({
513→            //     })
514→            // }
515→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && mustBeFollowedByNewline(node)) ||
516→            // permit
517→            // when (this) {
518→            //     in 0x1F600..0x1F64F, // Emoticons
519→            //     0x200D // Zero-width Joiner
520→            //     -> true
521→            // }
522→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && node.prevLeaf()?.textContains('\n') == true)
523→        ) {
524→            return
525→        }
526→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
527→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
528→        }
529→        val r = node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE } ?: return
530→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
531→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.indent())
532→        }
533→    }
534→
535→    private fun requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
536→        node: ASTNode,
537→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
538→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
539→        indent: String,
540→    ) {
541→        emit(
542→            node.startOffset - 1,
543→            """Missing newline before "${node.text}"""",
544→            true,
545→        )
546→        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + ((if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before ${node.text}") }
547→        if (autoCorrect) {
548→            node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indent)
549→        }
550→    }
551→
552→    private fun requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
553→        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired: ASTNode,
554→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
555→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
556→        indent: String? = null,
557→        nodeToFix: ASTNode = nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired,
558→    ) {
559→        emit(
560→            nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.startOffset + 1,
561→            """Missing newline after "${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"""",
562→            true,
563→        )
564→        LOGGER.trace {
565→            "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline after ${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"
566→        }
567→        if (autoCorrect) {
568→            val tempIndent = indent ?: (nodeToFix.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent))
569→            nodeToFix.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(tempIndent)
570→        }
571→    }
572→
573→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
574→        for (child in node.children()) {
575→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
576→                val v = child.text
577→                if (v == "\n") {
578→                    return true
579→                }
580→            }
581→        }
582→        return false
583→    }
584→
585→    private fun ASTNode.hasLineBreak(vararg ignoreElementTypes: IElementType): Boolean {
586→        if (isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) return true
587→        return if (ignoreElementTypes.isEmpty()) {
588→            textContains('\n')
589→        } else {
590→            elementType !in ignoreElementTypes &&
591→                children().any { c -> c.textContains('\n') && c.elementType !in ignoreElementTypes }
592→        }
593→    }
594→
595→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")
596→
597→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimMargin() = isFollowedBy("trimMargin()")
598→
599→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
600→        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
601→            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }
602→
603→    /**
604→     *  Allow for-statement in which only the expression contains a newline:
605→     *     for (foo in listOf(
606→     *         "foo-1",
607→     *         "foo-2"
608→     *     )) { ... }
609→     * but reject:
610→     *     for (
611→     *         foo in listOf(
612→     *             "foo-1",
613→     *             "foo-2"
614→     *         )
615→     *     ) { ... }
616→     */
617→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression(): Boolean {
618→        if (treeParent.elementType != ElementType.FOR) {
619→            return false
620→        }
621→        if (this.elementType != LPAR) {
622→            return treeParent.findChildByType(LPAR)!!.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()
623→        }
624→        require(elementType == LPAR) {
625→            "Node should be the LPAR of the FOR loop"
626→        }
627→
628→        var node: ASTNode? = this
629→        while (node != null && node.elementType != RPAR) {
630→            if (node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
631→                return false
632→            }
633→            node = node.nextSibling()
634→        }
635→        return true
636→    }
637→
638→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
639→        node: ASTNode,
640→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
641→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
642→    ) {
643→        if (node.elementType == BLOCK) {
644→            val startOfBlock = node.prevLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
645→            if (startOfBlock?.elementType != LBRACE) {
646→                return
647→            }
648→            val blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline = startOfBlock.nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
649→            val endOfBlock = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
650→            val blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline = endOfBlock?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
651→            val wrapBlock =
652→                !blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline && (
653→                    blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline || node.textContains('\n')
654→                    )
655→            if (wrapBlock && endOfBlock != null) {
656→                requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
657→                    endOfBlock,
658→                    autoCorrect,
659→                    emit,
660→                    node.treeParent.indent(),
661→                )
662→            }
663→        }
664→    }
665→
666→    private companion object {
667→        private val LTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(LPAR, LBRACE, LBRACKET, LT)
668→        private val RTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(RPAR, RBRACE, RBRACKET, GT)
669→        private val MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP =
670→            LTOKEN_SET.types.zip(
671→                RTOKEN_SET.types,
672→            ).toMap()
673→    }
674→}
675→
676→public val WRAPPING_RULE_ID: RuleId = WrappingRule().ruleId
677→

 46→/**
 47→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 48→ *
 49→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 50→ *
 51→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 52→ *
 53→ *    ```
 54→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 55→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *
 58→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 59→ *
 60→ *    ```
 61→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 62→ *    var x: String
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *
 65→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 66→ *
 67→ *    ```
 68→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *
 71→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 72→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 73→ *
 74→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 75→ */
 76→public class AnnotationRule :
 77→    StandardRule(
 78→        id = "annotation",
 79→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 80→            setOf(
 81→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 82→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 83→            ),
 84→        visitorModifiers =
 85→            setOf(
 86→                RunAfterRule(
 87→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 88→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 89→                ),
 90→            ),
 91→    ) {
 92→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 93→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 94→
 95→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 96→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 97→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 98→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 99→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
100→        )
101→    }
102→
103→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
104→        node: ASTNode,
105→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
106→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
107→    ) {
108→        when (node.elementType) {
109→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
110→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
111→            }
112→            ANNOTATION -> {
113→                // Annotation array
114→                //     @[...]
115→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
116→            }
117→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
118→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
124→        node: ASTNode,
125→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
126→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
127→    ) {
128→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
129→
130→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
131→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
132→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
133→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
134→        ) {
135→            // Disallow:
136→            //     @Foo class Bar
137→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
138→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
139→            //     fun foo(
140→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
141→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
142→            //     ) {}
143→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
144→        }
145→
146→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
147→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
148→                // Code below is disallowed
149→                //   @Foo1
150→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
151→                emit(
152→                    node.startOffset,
153→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
154→                    true,
155→                )
156→                if (autoCorrect) {
157→                    node
158→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
159→                        .nextLeaf()
160→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
161→                }
162→            }
163→
164→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
165→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
166→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
167→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
168→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
169→            ) {
170→                // Code below is disallowed
171→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
172→                // But following is allowed:
173→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
174→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
175→                emit(
176→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
185→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
186→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
187→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
188→                                },
189→                        )
190→                }
191→            }
192→
193→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
194→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
195→                ?.let { startOfList ->
196→                    // Code below is disallowed
197→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
198→                    // But following is allowed:
199→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
200→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
201→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
202→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
203→                    ) {
204→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
205→                        if (autoCorrect) {
206→                            startOfList
207→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
208→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
209→                                )
210→                        }
211→                    }
212→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
213→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
214→                    ) {
215→                        node
216→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
217→                            .treeParent
218→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
220→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
221→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
222→                                if (autoCorrect) {
223→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
224→                                }
225→                            }
226→                    }
227→                }
228→        }
229→
230→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
231→            // Code below is disallowed
232→            //   @Foo1
233→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
234→            //   fun foo() {}
235→            emit(
236→                node.startOffset,
237→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
238→                true,
239→            )
240→            if (autoCorrect) {
241→                node
242→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
243→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
244→            }
245→        }
246→    }
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
249→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
250→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
251→            ?.treeParent
252→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
253→            ?.treeParent
254→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
255→            ?.treeParent
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
258→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
259→        return siblings(forward = false)
260→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
261→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
262→    }
263→
264→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
265→        node: ASTNode,
266→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
267→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
268→    ) {
269→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
270→            emit(
271→                node.startOffset,
272→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
273→                true,
274→            )
275→            if (autoCorrect) {
276→                node
277→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
278→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
279→            }
280→        }
281→
282→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
283→            emit(
284→                node.startOffset,
285→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
286→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
287→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
288→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
289→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
290→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
291→            )
292→            if (autoCorrect) {
293→                node
294→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
295→                    .nextLeaf()
296→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
297→                    ?.let {
298→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
299→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
300→                        } else {
301→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
302→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
303→                            )
304→                        }
305→                    }
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
311→
312→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
313→        psi
314→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
315→            ?.useSiteTarget
316→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
317→
318→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
319→
320→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
321→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
322→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
323→
324→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
325→        this ==
326→            treeParent
327→                .children()
328→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
329→
330→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
331→        this ==
332→            treeParent
333→                .children()
334→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
335→
336→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
337→        siblings(forward = false)
338→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
339→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
340→
341→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
342→        siblings()
343→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
344→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
345→
346→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
347→        siblings(forward = false)
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
351→        siblings(forward = false)
352→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
353→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
356→
357→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
358→        siblings(forward = true)
359→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
363→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
364→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
365→            .leaves(forward = true)
366→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
367→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
368→    }
369→
370→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
371→        val astNode =
372→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
373→                treeParent
374→            } else {
375→                this
376→            }
377→        return checkNotNull(
378→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
379→        )
380→    }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
383→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
384→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
385→        } else {
386→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
387→        }
388→
389→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
390→        node: ASTNode,
391→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
392→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
393→    ) {
394→        node
395→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
396→            .nextCodeLeaf()
397→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
398→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
399→
400→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
401→                    emit(
402→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
403→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
404→                        true,
405→                    )
406→                    if (autoCorrect) {
407→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
408→                    }
409→                }
410→            }
411→    }
412→
413→    private fun visitAnnotation(
414→        node: ASTNode,
415→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
416→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
417→    ) {
418→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
419→
420→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
421→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
422→        ) {
423→            emit(
424→                node.startOffset,
425→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
426→                true,
427→            )
428→            if (autoCorrect) {
429→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
430→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
431→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
432→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
433→                }
434→            }
435→        }
436→    }
437→
438→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
439→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
440→            modifierListRoot
441→                .treeParent
442→                .treePrev
443→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
444→        val indentWithoutNewline =
445→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
446→                ?.text
447→                .orEmpty()
448→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
449→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
450→    }
451→}
452→
453→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
454→

 47→/**
 48→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 49→ *
 50→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 51→ *
 52→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 53→ *
 54→ *    ```
 55→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 56→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 57→ *    ```
 58→ *
 59→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 60→ *
 61→ *    ```
 62→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 63→ *    var x: String
 64→ *    ```
 65→ *
 66→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 67→ *
 68→ *    ```
 69→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 70→ *    ```
 71→ *
 72→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 73→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 74→ *
 75→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 76→ */
 77→public class AnnotationRule :
 78→    StandardRule(
 79→        id = "annotation",
 80→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 81→            setOf(
 82→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 83→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 84→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 85→            ),
 86→visitorModifiers =
 87→            setOf(
 88→                RunAfterRule(
 89→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 90→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 91→                ),
 92→            ),
 93→    ) {
 94→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 95→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 96→
 97→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 98→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 99→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
100→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
101→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
102→        )
103→    }
104→
105→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
106→        node: ASTNode,
107→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
108→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
109→    ) {
110→        when (node.elementType) {
111→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
112→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
113→            }
114→            ANNOTATION -> {
115→                // Annotation array
116→                //     @[...]
117→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
118→            }
119→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
120→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
121→            }
122→        }
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
126→        node: ASTNode,
127→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
128→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
129→    ) {
130→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
131→
132→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
133→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
134→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
135→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
136→        ) {
137→            // Disallow:
138→            //     @Foo class Bar
139→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
140→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
141→            //     fun foo(
142→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
143→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
144→            //     ) {}
145→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
146→        }
147→
148→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
149→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
150→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
151→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
152→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
153→        ) {
154→            emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
155→            if (autoCorrect) {
156→                node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
157→                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).applyIf(node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
158→                        plus(indentConfig.indent)
159→                    },
160→                )
161→            }
162→        }
163→
164→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
165→            if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
166→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR &&
167→                node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
168→            ) {
169→                emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
170→                if (autoCorrect) {
171→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent))
172→                }
173→            }
174→
175→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
176→// Code below is disallowed
177→                //   @Foo1
178→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
179→                emit(
180→                    node.startOffset,
181→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
182→                    true,
183→                )
184→                if (autoCorrect) {
185→                    node
186→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
187→                        .nextLeaf()
188→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
189→                }
190→            }
191→
192→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
193→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
194→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
195→                (
196→                    node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() ||
197→                        (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
198→                    ) &&
199→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
200→            ) {
201→                // Code below is disallowed
202→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
203→                // But following is allowed:
204→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
205→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
206→                val errorMessage =
207→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()) {
208→                        "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct"
209→                    } else {
210→                        "Annotation should be on a separate line"
211→                    }
212→                emit(
213→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
214→                    errorMessage,
215→                    true,
216→                )
217→                if (autoCorrect) {
218→                    node
219→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
220→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
221→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
222→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
223→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null || node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
224→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
225→                                },
226→                        )
227→                }
228→            }
229→
230→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
231→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
232→                ?.let { startOfList ->
233→                    // Code below is disallowed
234→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
235→                    // But following is allowed:
236→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
237→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
238→                    if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() || node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList()) &&
239→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
240→                    ) {
241→emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
242→                        if (autoCorrect) {
243→                            startOfList
244→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
245→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
246→                                )
247→                        }
248→                    }
249→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
250→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
251→                    ) {
252→                        node
253→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
254→                            .treeParent
255→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
256→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
257→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
258→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
259→                                if (autoCorrect) {
260→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
261→                                }
262→                            }
263→                    }
264→                }
265→        }
266→
267→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
268→            // Code below is disallowed
269→            //   @Foo1
270→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
271→            //   fun foo() {}
272→            emit(
273→                node.startOffset,
274→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
275→                true,
276→            )
277→            if (autoCorrect) {
278→                node
279→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
280→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
281→            }
282→        }
283→    }
284→
285→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
286→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
287→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
288→            ?.treeParent
289→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
290→            ?.treeParent
291→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
292→            ?.treeParent
293→
294→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
295→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
296→        return siblings(forward = false)
297→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
298→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
299→    }
300→
301→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
302→        node: ASTNode,
303→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
304→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
305→    ) {
306→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
307→            emit(
308→                node.startOffset,
309→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
310→                true,
311→            )
312→            if (autoCorrect) {
313→                node
314→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
315→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
316→                        getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).applyIf(node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
317→                            plus(indentConfig.indent)
318→                        },
319→                    )
320→            }
321→        }
322→
323→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
324→            emit(
325→                node.startOffset,
326→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
327→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
328→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
329→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
330→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
331→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
332→            )
333→            if (autoCorrect) {
334→                node
335→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
336→                    .nextLeaf()
337→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
338→                    ?.let {
339→                        val newlineWithIndent =
340→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).applyIf(node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
341→                                plus(indentConfig.indent)
342→                            }
343→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
344→                            it.replaceWithText(newlineWithIndent)
345→                        } else {
346→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
347→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(newlineWithIndent),
348→                            )
349→                        }
350→                    }
351→            }
352→        }
353→    }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
356→
357→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
358→        psi
359→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
360→            ?.useSiteTarget
361→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
362→
363→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
364→
365→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
366→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
367→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
368→
369→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
370→        this ==
371→            treeParent
372→                .children()
373→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
374→
375→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
376→        this ==
377→            treeParent
378→                .children()
379→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
380→
381→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
382→        siblings(forward = false)
383→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
384→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
385→
386→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
387→        siblings()
388→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
389→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
390→
391→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
392→        siblings(forward = false)
393→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
394→
395→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
396→        siblings(forward = false)
397→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
398→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
399→
400→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
401→
402→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
403→        siblings(forward = true)
404→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
405→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
406→
407→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
408→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
409→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
410→            .leaves(forward = true)
411→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
412→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
413→    }
414→
415→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
416→        val astNode =
417→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
418→                treeParent
419→            } else {
420→                this
421→            }
422→        return checkNotNull(
423→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
424→        )
425→    }
426→
427→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
428→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
429→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
430→        } else {
431→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
432→        }
433→
434→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
435→        node: ASTNode,
436→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
437→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
438→    ) {
439→        node
440→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
441→            .nextCodeLeaf()
442→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
443→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
444→
445→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
446→                    emit(
447→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
448→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
449→                        true,
450→                    )
451→                    if (autoCorrect) {
452→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
453→                    }
454→                }
455→            }
456→    }
457→
458→    private fun visitAnnotation(
459→        node: ASTNode,
460→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
461→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
462→    ) {
463→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
464→
465→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
466→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
467→        ) {
468→            emit(
469→                node.startOffset,
470→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
471→                true,
472→            )
473→            if (autoCorrect) {
474→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
475→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
476→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
477→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
478→                }
479→            }
480→        }
481→    }
482→
483→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
484→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
485→            modifierListRoot
486→                .treeParent
487→                .treePrev
488→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
489→        val indentWithoutNewline =
490→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
491→                ?.text
492→                .orEmpty()
493→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
494→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
495→    }
496→}
497→
498→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
499→
