 48→/**
 49→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 50→ *
 51→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 52→ *
 53→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 54→ *
 55→ *    ```
 56→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 57→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 58→ *    ```
 59→ *
 60→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 61→ *
 62→ *    ```
 63→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 64→ *    var x: String
 65→ *    ```
 66→ *
 67→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 68→ *
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 71→ *    ```
 72→ *
 73→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 74→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 75→ *
 76→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 77→ */
 78→public class AnnotationRule :
 79→    StandardRule(
 80→        id = "annotation",
 81→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 82→            setOf(
 83→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 84→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 85→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 86→            ),
 87→visitorModifiers =
 88→            setOf(
 89→                RunAfterRule(
 90→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 91→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 92→                ),
 93→            ),
 94→    ) {
 95→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 96→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 97→
 98→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 99→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
100→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
101→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
102→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
103→        )
104→    }
105→
106→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
107→        node: ASTNode,
108→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
109→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
110→    ) {
111→        when (node.elementType) {
112→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
113→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
114→            }
115→            ANNOTATION -> {
116→                // Annotation array
117→                //     @[...]
118→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
121→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
122→            }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
127→        node: ASTNode,
128→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
129→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
130→    ) {
131→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
132→
133→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
134→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
135→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
136→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
137→        ) {
138→            // Disallow:
139→            //     @Foo class Bar
140→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
141→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
142→            //     fun foo(
143→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
144→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
145→            //     ) {}
146→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
147→        }
148→
149→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
150→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
151→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
152→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
153→            node.typeProjectionOrNull() == null &&
154→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
155→        ) {
156→            emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
157→            if (autoCorrect) {
158→                node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
159→            }
160→        }
161→
162→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
163→            if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
164→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR &&
165→                node.isFirstAnnotationEntry() &&
166→                !node.isPrecededByNewline()
167→            ) {
168→                emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
169→                if (autoCorrect) {
170→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
171→                }
172→            }
173→
174→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
175→// Code below is disallowed
176→                //   @Foo1
177→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
178→                emit(
179→                    node.startOffset,
180→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
181→                    true,
182→                )
183→                if (autoCorrect) {
184→                    node
185→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
186→                        .nextLeaf()
187→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
188→                }
189→            }
190→
191→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
192→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
193→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
194→                (
195→                    node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() ||
196→                        (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
197→                    ) &&
198→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
199→            ) {
200→                // Code below is disallowed
201→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
202→                // But following is allowed:
203→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
204→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
205→                val errorMessage =
206→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()) {
207→                        "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct"
208→                    } else {
209→                        "Annotation should be on a separate line"
210→                    }
211→                emit(
212→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
213→                    errorMessage,
214→                    true,
215→                )
216→                if (autoCorrect) {
217→                    node
218→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
220→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
221→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
222→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
223→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
224→                                },
225→                        )
226→                }
227→}
228→
229→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
230→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
231→                ?.let { startOfList ->
232→                    // Code below is disallowed
233→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
234→                    // But following is allowed:
235→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
236→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
237→                    if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() || node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList()) &&
238→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
239→                    ) {
240→emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
241→                        if (autoCorrect) {
242→                            startOfList
243→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
244→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
245→                                )
246→                        }
247→                    }
248→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
249→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
250→                    ) {
251→                        node
252→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
253→                            .treeParent
254→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
255→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
256→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
257→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
258→                                if (autoCorrect) {
259→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
260→                                }
261→                            }
262→                    }
263→                }
264→        }
265→
266→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
267→            // Code below is disallowed
268→            //   @Foo1
269→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
270→            //   fun foo() {}
271→            emit(
272→                node.startOffset,
273→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
274→                true,
275→            )
276→            if (autoCorrect) {
277→                node
278→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
279→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
280→            }
281→        }
282→    }
283→
284→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByNewline() =
285→        firstChildLeafOrSelf()
286→            .leaves(forward = false)
287→            .drop(1)
288→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
289→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
290→
291→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
292→takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
293→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
294→            ?.treeParent
295→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
296→            ?.treeParent
297→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
298→            ?.treeParent
299→
300→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
301→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
302→        return siblings(forward = false)
303→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
304→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
305→    }
306→
307→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
308→        node: ASTNode,
309→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
310→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
311→    ) {
312→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
313→            emit(
314→                node.startOffset,
315→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
316→                true,
317→            )
318→            if (autoCorrect) {
319→                node
320→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
321→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
322→            }
323→        }
324→
325→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
326→            emit(
327→                node.startOffset,
328→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
329→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
330→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
331→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
332→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
333→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
334→            )
335→            if (autoCorrect) {
336→                node
337→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
338→                    .nextLeaf()
339→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
340→                    ?.let {
341→                        val newlineWithIndent = getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
342→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
343→                            it.replaceWithText(newlineWithIndent)
344→                        } else {
345→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
346→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(newlineWithIndent),
347→                            )
348→                        }
349→                    }
350→            }
351→        }
352→}
353→
354→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
355→
356→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
357→        psi
358→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
359→            ?.useSiteTarget
360→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
363→
364→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
365→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
366→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
367→
368→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
369→        this ==
370→            treeParent
371→                .children()
372→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
373→
374→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
375→        this ==
376→            treeParent
377→                .children()
378→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
379→
380→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
381→        siblings(forward = false)
382→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
383→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
386→        siblings()
387→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
388→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
389→
390→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
391→        siblings(forward = false)
392→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
393→
394→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
395→        siblings(forward = false)
396→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
397→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
398→
399→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
400→
401→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
402→        siblings(forward = true)
403→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
404→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
405→
406→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
407→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
408→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
409→            .leaves(forward = true)
410→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
411→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
412→    }
413→
414→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
415→        val astNode =
416→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
417→                treeParent
418→            } else {
419→                this
420→            }
421→        return checkNotNull(
422→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
423→        )
424→    }
425→
426→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
427→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
428→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
429→        } else {
430→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
431→        }
432→
433→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
434→        node: ASTNode,
435→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
436→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
437→    ) {
438→        node
439→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
440→            .nextCodeLeaf()
441→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
442→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
443→
444→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
445→                    emit(
446→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
447→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
448→                        true,
449→                    )
450→                    if (autoCorrect) {
451→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
452→                    }
453→                }
454→            }
455→    }
456→
457→    private fun visitAnnotation(
458→        node: ASTNode,
459→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
460→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
461→    ) {
462→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
463→
464→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
465→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
466→        ) {
467→            emit(
468→                node.startOffset,
469→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
470→                true,
471→            )
472→            if (autoCorrect) {
473→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
474→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
475→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
476→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
477→                }
478→            }
479→        }
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
483→        val treeParent = modifierListRoot.treeParent
484→        return if (treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
485→            "\n" + treeParent.treeParent.indent() + indentConfig.indent
486→        } else {
487→            val nodeBeforeAnnotations = treeParent.treePrev
488→            "\n" + nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text.orEmpty().substringAfterLast('\n')
489→        }
490→    }
491→}
492→
493→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
494→

 48→/**
 49→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 50→ *
 51→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 52→ *
 53→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 54→ *
 55→ *    ```
 56→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 57→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 58→ *    ```
 59→ *
 60→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 61→ *
 62→ *    ```
 63→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 64→ *    var x: String
 65→ *    ```
 66→ *
 67→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 68→ *
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 71→ *    ```
 72→ *
 73→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 74→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 75→ *
 76→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 77→ */
 78→public class AnnotationRule :
 79→    StandardRule(
 80→        id = "annotation",
 81→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 82→            setOf(
 83→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 84→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 85→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 86→            ),
 87→visitorModifiers =
 88→            setOf(
 89→                RunAfterRule(
 90→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 91→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 92→                ),
 93→            ),
 94→    ) {
 95→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 96→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 97→
 98→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 99→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
100→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
101→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
102→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
103→        )
104→    }
105→
106→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
107→        node: ASTNode,
108→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
109→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
110→    ) {
111→        when (node.elementType) {
112→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
113→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
114→            }
115→            ANNOTATION -> {
116→                // Annotation array
117→                //     @[...]
118→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
121→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
122→            }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
127→        node: ASTNode,
128→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
129→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
130→    ) {
131→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
132→
133→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
134→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
135→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
136→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
137→        ) {
138→            // Disallow:
139→            //     @Foo class Bar
140→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
141→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
142→            //     fun foo(
143→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
144→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
145→            //     ) {}
146→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
147→        }
148→
149→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
150→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
151→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
152→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
153→            node.typeProjectionOrNull() == null &&
154→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
155→        ) {
156→            emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
157→            if (autoCorrect) {
158→                node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
159→            }
160→        }
161→
162→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
163→            if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
164→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR &&
165→                node.isFirstAnnotationEntry() &&
166→                !node.isPrecededByNewline()
167→            ) {
168→                emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation should be on a separate line", true)
169→                if (autoCorrect) {
170→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
171→                }
172→            }
173→
174→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
175→// Code below is disallowed
176→                //   @Foo1
177→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
178→                emit(
179→                    node.startOffset,
180→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
181→                    true,
182→                )
183→                if (autoCorrect) {
184→                    node
185→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
186→                        .nextLeaf()
187→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
188→                }
189→            }
190→
191→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
192→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
193→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
194→                (
195→                    node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() ||
196→                        (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
197→                    ) &&
198→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
199→            ) {
200→                // Code below is disallowed
201→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
202→                // But following is allowed:
203→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
204→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
205→                val errorMessage =
206→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()) {
207→                        "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct"
208→                    } else {
209→                        "Annotation should be on a separate line"
210→                    }
211→                emit(
212→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
213→                    errorMessage,
214→                    true,
215→                )
216→                if (autoCorrect) {
217→                    node
218→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
220→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
221→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
222→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
223→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
224→                                },
225→                        )
226→                }
227→}
228→
229→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
230→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
231→                ?.let { startOfList ->
232→                    // Code below is disallowed
233→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
234→                    // But following is allowed:
235→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
236→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
237→                    if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() || node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList()) &&
238→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
239→                    ) {
240→emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
241→                        if (autoCorrect) {
242→                            startOfList
243→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
244→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
245→                                )
246→                        }
247→                    }
248→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
249→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
250→                    ) {
251→                        node
252→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
253→                            .treeParent
254→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
255→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
256→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
257→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
258→                                if (autoCorrect) {
259→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
260→                                }
261→                            }
262→                    }
263→                }
264→        }
265→
266→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
267→            // Code below is disallowed
268→            //   @Foo1
269→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
270→            //   fun foo() {}
271→            emit(
272→                node.startOffset,
273→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
274→                true,
275→            )
276→            if (autoCorrect) {
277→                node
278→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
279→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
280→            }
281→        }
282→    }
283→
284→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByNewline() =
285→        firstChildLeafOrSelf()
286→            .leaves(forward = false)
287→            .drop(1)
288→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
289→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
290→
291→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
292→takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
293→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
294→            ?.treeParent
295→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
296→            ?.treeParent
297→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
298→            ?.treeParent
299→
300→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
301→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
302→        return siblings(forward = false)
303→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
304→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
305→    }
306→
307→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
308→        node: ASTNode,
309→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
310→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
311→    ) {
312→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
313→            emit(
314→                node.startOffset,
315→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
316→                true,
317→            )
318→            if (autoCorrect) {
319→                node
320→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
321→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
322→            }
323→        }
324→
325→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
326→            emit(
327→                node.startOffset,
328→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
329→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
330→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
331→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
332→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
333→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
334→            )
335→            if (autoCorrect) {
336→                node
337→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
338→                    .nextLeaf()
339→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
340→                    ?.let {
341→                        val newlineWithIndent = getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
342→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
343→                            it.replaceWithText(newlineWithIndent)
344→                        } else {
345→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
346→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(newlineWithIndent),
347→                            )
348→                        }
349→                    }
350→            }
351→        }
352→}
353→
354→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
355→
356→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
357→        psi
358→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
359→            ?.useSiteTarget
360→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
363→
364→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
365→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
366→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
367→
368→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
369→        this ==
370→            treeParent
371→                .children()
372→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
373→
374→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
375→        this ==
376→            treeParent
377→                .children()
378→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
379→
380→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
381→        siblings(forward = false)
382→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
383→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
386→        siblings()
387→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
388→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
389→
390→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
391→        siblings(forward = false)
392→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
393→
394→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
395→        siblings(forward = false)
396→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
397→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
398→
399→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
400→
401→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
402→        siblings(forward = true)
403→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
404→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
405→
406→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
407→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
408→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
409→            .leaves(forward = true)
410→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
411→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
412→    }
413→
414→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
415→        val astNode =
416→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
417→                treeParent
418→            } else {
419→                this
420→            }
421→        return checkNotNull(
422→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
423→        )
424→    }
425→
426→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
427→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
428→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
429→        } else {
430→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
431→        }
432→
433→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
434→        node: ASTNode,
435→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
436→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
437→    ) {
438→        node
439→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
440→            .nextCodeLeaf()
441→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
442→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
443→
444→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
445→                    emit(
446→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
447→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
448→                        true,
449→                    )
450→                    if (autoCorrect) {
451→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
452→                    }
453→                }
454→            }
455→    }
456→
457→    private fun visitAnnotation(
458→        node: ASTNode,
459→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
460→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
461→    ) {
462→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
463→
464→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
465→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
466→        ) {
467→            emit(
468→                node.startOffset,
469→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
470→                true,
471→            )
472→            if (autoCorrect) {
473→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
474→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
475→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
476→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
477→                }
478→            }
479→        }
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
483→        val treeParent = modifierListRoot.treeParent
484→        return if (treeParent.elementType == ElementType.PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR) {
485→            "\n" + treeParent.treeParent.indent() + indentConfig.indent
486→        } else {
487→            val nodeBeforeAnnotations = treeParent.treePrev
488→            "\n" + nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text.orEmpty().substringAfterLast('\n')
489→        }
490→    }
491→}
492→
493→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
494→

content.text:
I have resolved the issue by making the following changes to `AnnotationRule.kt`:

1.  **Added `CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY` support**: The rule now correctly retrieves the `ktlint_code_style` setting from `.editorconfig`.
2.  **Strict Annotation Wrapping for `ktlint_official`**:
    *   Implemented logic to ensure that multiple annotations on the same line are wrapped onto separate lines when using the `ktlint_official` code style.
    *   This applies to most declarations (functions, classes, etc.) but specifically excludes type projections to match the desired behavior shown in the issue examples.
3.  **Enhanced Primary Constructor Wrapping**:
    *   Added specific logic for `PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR` to ensure that annotations are placed on a new line after the class name and that the `constructor` keyword is also moved to a new line when annotations are present.
    *   Improved `getNewlineWithIndent` to correctly calculate the indentation for primary constructor content, ensuring it is indented one level deeper than the class declaration.
    *   Ensured that the first annotation of a primary constructor is forced to a new line even if it's the only one, as required by the `ktlint_official` style.
4.  **Improved Type Projection Wrapping**:
    *   Updated the logic for type projections to trigger the wrapping of the entire `TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST` if any type projection contains an annotation with parameters.
    *   Maintained the existing behavior where a single annotation without parameters does not force wrapping of the list.
5.  **Robust Indentation Logic**:
    *   Fixed a bug in `getNewlineWithIndent` where a simple space between the class name and the primary constructor was being treated as part of the indentation, leading to incorrect formatting.
    *   The rule now uses the `indent()` extension function to reliably find the base indentation of the containing class or declaration.

These changes ensure that `ktlint` follows the stricter annotation wrapping rules of the `ktlint_official` code style while maintaining compatibility with standard Kotlin conventions for other styles.

 46→/**
 47→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 48→ *
 49→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 50→ *
 51→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 52→ *
 53→ *    ```
 54→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 55→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *
 58→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 59→ *
 60→ *    ```
 61→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 62→ *    var x: String
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *
 65→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 66→ *
 67→ *    ```
 68→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 69→ *    ```
 70→ *
 71→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 72→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 73→ *
 74→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 75→ */
 76→public class AnnotationRule :
 77→    StandardRule(
 78→        id = "annotation",
 79→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 80→            setOf(
 81→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 82→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 83→            ),
 84→        visitorModifiers =
 85→            setOf(
 86→                RunAfterRule(
 87→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 88→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 89→                ),
 90→            ),
 91→    ) {
 92→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 93→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 94→
 95→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 96→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 97→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 98→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 99→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
100→        )
101→    }
102→
103→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
104→        node: ASTNode,
105→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
106→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
107→    ) {
108→        when (node.elementType) {
109→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
110→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
111→            }
112→            ANNOTATION -> {
113→                // Annotation array
114→                //     @[...]
115→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
116→            }
117→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
118→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
124→        node: ASTNode,
125→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
126→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
127→    ) {
128→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
129→
130→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
131→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
132→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
133→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
134→        ) {
135→            // Disallow:
136→            //     @Foo class Bar
137→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
138→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
139→            //     fun foo(
140→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
141→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
142→            //     ) {}
143→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
144→        }
145→
146→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
147→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
148→                // Code below is disallowed
149→                //   @Foo1
150→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
151→                emit(
152→                    node.startOffset,
153→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
154→                    true,
155→                )
156→                if (autoCorrect) {
157→                    node
158→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
159→                        .nextLeaf()
160→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
161→                }
162→            }
163→
164→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
165→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
166→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
167→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
168→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
169→            ) {
170→                // Code below is disallowed
171→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
172→                // But following is allowed:
173→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
174→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
175→                emit(
176→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
177→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
178→                    true,
179→                )
180→                if (autoCorrect) {
181→                    node
182→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
183→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
184→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(
185→                            getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)
186→                                .applyIf(node.typeProjectionOrNull() != null) {
187→                                    plus(indentConfig.indent)
188→                                },
189→                        )
190→                }
191→            }
192→
193→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
194→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
195→                ?.let { startOfList ->
196→                    // Code below is disallowed
197→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
198→                    // But following is allowed:
199→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
200→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
201→                    if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
202→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
203→                    ) {
204→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
205→                        if (autoCorrect) {
206→                            startOfList
207→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(
208→                                    getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent).plus(indentConfig.indent),
209→                                )
210→                        }
211→                    }
212→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
213→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
214→                    ) {
215→                        node
216→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
217→                            .treeParent
218→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
219→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
220→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
221→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
222→                                if (autoCorrect) {
223→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
224→                                }
225→                            }
226→                    }
227→                }
228→        }
229→
230→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
231→            // Code below is disallowed
232→            //   @Foo1
233→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
234→            //   fun foo() {}
235→            emit(
236→                node.startOffset,
237→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
238→                true,
239→            )
240→            if (autoCorrect) {
241→                node
242→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
243→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
244→            }
245→        }
246→    }
247→
248→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
249→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
250→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
251→            ?.treeParent
252→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
253→            ?.treeParent
254→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
255→            ?.treeParent
256→
257→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
258→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
259→        return siblings(forward = false)
260→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
261→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
262→    }
263→
264→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
265→        node: ASTNode,
266→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
267→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
268→    ) {
269→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
270→            emit(
271→                node.startOffset,
272→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
273→                true,
274→            )
275→            if (autoCorrect) {
276→                node
277→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
278→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
279→            }
280→        }
281→
282→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
283→            emit(
284→                node.startOffset,
285→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
286→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
287→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
288→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
289→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
290→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
291→            )
292→            if (autoCorrect) {
293→                node
294→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
295→                    .nextLeaf()
296→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
297→                    ?.let {
298→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
299→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
300→                        } else {
301→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
302→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
303→                            )
304→                        }
305→                    }
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
311→
312→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
313→        psi
314→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
315→            ?.useSiteTarget
316→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
317→
318→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
319→
320→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
321→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
322→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
323→
324→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
325→        this ==
326→            treeParent
327→                .children()
328→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
329→
330→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
331→        this ==
332→            treeParent
333→                .children()
334→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
335→
336→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
337→        siblings(forward = false)
338→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
339→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
340→
341→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
342→        siblings()
343→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
344→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
345→
346→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
347→        siblings(forward = false)
348→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
351→        siblings(forward = false)
352→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
353→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
356→
357→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
358→        siblings(forward = true)
359→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
361→
362→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
363→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
364→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
365→            .leaves(forward = true)
366→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
367→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
368→    }
369→
370→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
371→        val astNode =
372→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
373→                treeParent
374→            } else {
375→                this
376→            }
377→        return checkNotNull(
378→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
379→        )
380→    }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
383→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
384→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
385→        } else {
386→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
387→        }
388→
389→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
390→        node: ASTNode,
391→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
392→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
393→    ) {
394→        node
395→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
396→            .nextCodeLeaf()
397→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
398→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
399→
400→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
401→                    emit(
402→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
403→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
404→                        true,
405→                    )
406→                    if (autoCorrect) {
407→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
408→                    }
409→                }
410→            }
411→    }
412→
413→    private fun visitAnnotation(
414→        node: ASTNode,
415→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
416→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
417→    ) {
418→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
419→
420→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
421→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
422→        ) {
423→            emit(
424→                node.startOffset,
425→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
426→                true,
427→            )
428→            if (autoCorrect) {
429→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
430→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
431→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
432→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
433→                }
434→            }
435→        }
436→    }
437→
438→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
439→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations =
440→            modifierListRoot
441→                .treeParent
442→                .treePrev
443→        // Make sure we only insert a single newline
444→        val indentWithoutNewline =
445→            nodeBeforeAnnotations
446→                ?.text
447→                .orEmpty()
448→                .substringAfterLast('\n')
449→        return "\n".plus(indentWithoutNewline)
450→    }
451→}
452→
453→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
454→

tool_calls.output_content:
1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.Rule
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.findCompositeParentElementOfType
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfCompositeElementOfType
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextLeaf
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevLeaf
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevSibling
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 13→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 14→
 15→/**
 16→ * Lints and formats the spacing before and after the angle brackets of a type argument list.
 17→ */
 18→public class TypeArgumentListSpacingRule :
 19→    StandardRule("type-argument-list-spacing"),
 20→    Rule.Experimental {
 21→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 22→        node: ASTNode,
 23→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 24→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 25→    ) {
 26→        when (node.elementType) {
 27→            ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST -> {
 28→                visitFunctionDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 29→                visitInsideTypeArgumentList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 30→            }
 31→            ElementType.SUPER_TYPE_LIST, ElementType.SUPER_EXPRESSION ->
 32→                visitInsideTypeArgumentList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 33→        }
 34→    }
 35→
 36→    private fun visitFunctionDeclaration(
 37→        node: ASTNode,
 38→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 39→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 40→    ) {
 41→        // No whitespace expected before type argument list of function call
 42→        //    val list = listOf <String>()
 43→        node
 44→            .prevLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
 45→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.WHITE_SPACE }
 46→            ?.let { noWhitespaceExpected(it, autoCorrect, emit) }
 47→
 48→        // No whitespace expected after type argument list of function call
 49→        //    val list = listOf<String> ()
 50→        node
 51→            .takeUnless {
 52→                // unless it is part of a type reference:
 53→                //    fun foo(): List<Foo> { ... }
 54→                //    var bar: List<Bar> = emptyList()
 55→                it.isPartOfCompositeElementOfType(ElementType.TYPE_REFERENCE)
 56→            }
 57→            ?.takeUnless {
 58→                // unless it is part of a call expression followed by lambda:
 59→                //    bar<Foo> { ... }
 60→                it.isPartOfCallExpressionFollowedByLambda()
 61→            }
 62→            ?.lastChildNode
 63→            ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
 64→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.WHITE_SPACE }
 65→            ?.let { noWhitespaceExpected(it, autoCorrect, emit) }
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    private fun visitInsideTypeArgumentList(
 69→        node: ASTNode,
 70→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 71→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 72→    ) {
 73→        // No whitespace expected after opening angle bracket of type argument list
 74→        //    val list = listOf< String>()
 75→        node
 76→            .findChildByType(ElementType.LT)
 77→            ?.nextSibling()
 78→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.WHITE_SPACE }
 79→            ?.let { noWhitespaceExpected(it, autoCorrect, emit) }
 80→
 81→        // No whitespace expected before closing angle bracket of type argument list
 82→        //    val list = listOf<String >()
 83→        node
 84→            .findChildByType(ElementType.GT)
 85→            ?.prevSibling()
 86→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.WHITE_SPACE }
 87→            ?.let { noWhitespaceExpected(it, autoCorrect, emit) }
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    private fun noWhitespaceExpected(
 91→        node: ASTNode,
 92→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 93→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 94→    ) {
 95→        if (node.text != "") {
 96→            emit(
 97→                node.startOffset,
 98→                "No whitespace expected at this position",
 99→                true,
100→            )
101→            if (autoCorrect) {
102→                node.treeParent.removeChild(node)
103→            }
104→        }
105→    }
106→}
107→
108→private fun ASTNode.isPartOfCallExpressionFollowedByLambda(): Boolean =
109→    findCompositeParentElementOfType(ElementType.CALL_EXPRESSION)
110→        ?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.CALL_EXPRESSION }
111→        ?.findChildByType(ElementType.LAMBDA_ARGUMENT)
112→        .let { it != null }
113→
114→public val TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST_SPACING_RULE_ID: RuleId = TypeArgumentListSpacingRule().ruleId
115→

 157→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 158→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 159→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 160→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 161→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 162→        )
 163→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 164→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 165→        }
 166→    }
 167→
 168→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 169→        node: ASTNode,
 170→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 171→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 172→    ) {
 173→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 174→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 175→            node
 176→                .nextLeaf()
 177→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 178→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 179→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 180→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 181→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 182→                    }
 183→                }
 184→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 185→        }
 186→
 187→        when {
 188→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 189→                line++
 190→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 191→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 192→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 193→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 194→                    )
 195→                }
 196→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 197→            }
 198→
 199→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 200→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 201→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 202→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY ||
 203→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 204→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 205→                startIndentContext(
 206→                    fromAstNode = node,
 207→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 208→                )
 209→
 210→            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT ->
 211→                visitValueArgument(node)
 212→
 213→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 214→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 215→
 216→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 217→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 218→                startIndentContext(node)
 219→
 220→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 221→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 222→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 223→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ||
 224→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE ->
 225→                startIndentContext(node)
 226→
 227→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 228→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 229→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 230→                startIndentContext(
 231→                    fromAstNode = node,
 232→                    childIndent = "",

 235→            node.elementType == IF ->
 236→                visitIf(node)
 237→
 238→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 239→                visitLbrace(node)

 255→            node.elementType == FUN ->

 265→                visitBinaryExpression(node)

 267→            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {
 268→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 269→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 270→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&

 272→                ) {
 273→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 274→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 275→                    //    .bar[0] {

 277→                    //    }
 278→                    startIndentContext(

 281→                    )
